properties.Test Case: Create a new Digital Comic book. Ensure the Overlay Tool opens automatically. Do the same test for the Paper Comic Book.
properties.Steps: Create a new Digital Comic book. Ensure the Overlay Tool opens automatically. Do the same test for the Paper Comic Book.

properties.Test Case: Change the background color of a bubble then change bubble style. Colour choice should not be lost.
properties.Steps: Change the background color of a bubble then change bubble style. Colour choice should not be lost.

properties.Test Case: Test interactions with Image Editing Buttons and the Overlay Tool. Behaviour should work like this. (JT 6.3: I think this is talking about the large button for choosing the main (background) image. Earlier versions of Bloom had more than one such button, but now there's just one, apart from the toolbar controls, for editing the image. It should show up in the top right (a) when the background image is active, or (b) when no image or overlays are present. In either case, you have to be hovering over the page to see it.
properties.Steps: Test interactions with Image Editing Buttons and the Overlay Tool. Behaviour should work like this. (JT 6.3: I think this is talking about the large button for choosing the main (background) image. Earlier versions of Bloom had more than one such button, but now there's just one, apart from the toolbar controls, for editing the image. It should show up in the top right (a) when the background image is active, or (b) when no image or overlays are present. In either case, you have to be hovering over the page to see it.

properties.Test Case: Check the behavior of the large button (top left) for setting the copyright of a main (background) image. (a) no image chosen...never shows; (b) known license info: Copyright symbol on blue background, only shows when page is hovered and BG image is active; (c) missing license info, BG image active: Solid red box with question mark and copyright symbol in white; (d) missing license info, BG image not active: white background, question mark and copyright symbol in red
properties.Steps: Check the behavior of the large button (top left) for setting the copyright of a main (background) image. (a) no image chosen...never shows; (b) known license info: Copyright symbol on blue background, only shows when page is hovered and BG image is active; (c) missing license info, BG image active: Solid red box with question mark and copyright symbol in white; (d) missing license info, BG image not active: white background, question mark and copyright symbol in red
